name: MarketBubble
description: MarketBubble control room: show status, top chatters, Polymarket predictions, and the live X chat feed, inside Virta.

api_base_url.title: MarketBubble URL
api_base_url.description: Base URL of the MarketBubble dashboard deployment.

api_key.title: API key
api_key.description: The dashboard's X_CHAT_API_KEY (same key the Chrome extension uses). Public show data works without it; it authenticates operator endpoints.
